title: antikathistemi #0478
definition:
1) to put in place of another
 2) to place in opposition
    2a) to dispose troops, set an army in line of battle
    2b) to stand against, resist
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to put in place of another
 2) to place in opposition
    2a) to dispose troops, set an army in line of battle
    2b) to stand against, resist

    NASB:  to set down against, i.e. to replace, oppose:
